allow: Bash(node -e " // Look for any package using 'exports' field \(ESM packages that might confuse Metro\) const fs = require\('fs'\); const path = require\('path'\); const nmDir = './node_modules'; const dirs = fs.readdirSync\(nmDir\).slice\(0, 50\); dirs.forEach\(d => { try { const pkgPath = path.join\(nmDir, d, 'package.json'\); const pkg = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(pkgPath, 'utf8'\)\); if \(pkg.exports && typeof pkg.exports === 'object'\) { console.log\(d, '- has exports field, type:', pkg.type || 'cjs'\); } } catch\(e\) {} }\); ")
